hero.description: We transform traditional Autism Treatment into an engaging and effective experience through immersive VR games, personalized learning programs, and AI-powered adaptive scenarios.

features.title: Why Choose
features.description: Innovative VR treatment designed for children with autism

fastDevelopment.title: Personalized Learning
fastDevelopment.description: AI-powered adaptive scenarios that adjust to each child's unique needs, learning pace, and therapeutic goals.

scalable.title: Gamified Experience
scalable.description: Interactive VR games that make therapy engaging and enjoyable, encouraging active participation and better learning outcomes.

modern.title: Safe & Supervised
modern.description: Controlled virtual environments with therapist oversight and progress tracking for complete safety.

footer.description: Enabling immersive and data driven autism treatment.

featuresPage.title: Product Features
featuresPage.subtitle:
Discover the immersive therapy tools that
combine playful VR, adaptive AI, and real-world readiness

personalizedPrograms.title: Personalized Learning Programs
personalizedPrograms.description: Each VR experience is customized to the child's specific needs, learning style, and therapeutic goals. Our adaptive AI algorithms continuously adjust difficulty and engagement levels based on real-time performance.

therapistToolkit.title: Therapist Dashboard & Insights
therapistToolkit.description: Clinicians can set goals, manage the level of sensory input, and review session data with actionable insights that turn every game session into measurable growth.
therapistToolkit.bullet1: Live session controls and safety overrides
therapistToolkit.bullet4: Exportable reports for parents and schools

familyEngagement.title: Family-Friendly, Ready Anywhere
familyEngagement.description: Lightweight experiences designed for clinic, classroom, or home use keep parents and caregivers involved while maintaining therapist oversight.

customizableScenes.title: Customizable VR Scenes
customizableScenes.subtitle: Tailor scenarios to each child's needs.

school.title: School Argument De-escalation
school.description: Recreate classroom or hallway disagreements so children can practice effective communication, turn-taking, and perspective-taking, equipping them with essential social and emotional skills to cope with real-world conflicts.

home.title: Home Routine & Transitions
home.description: Practice morning and bedtime routines, expressing needs and emotions, and promoting relationships with siblings and parents at home with repeatable, guided prompts.

park.title: Park & Community Outings
park.description: Role-play playground sharing, turn taking, managing sensory overload, and safely navigating community spaces with therapist-controlled pacing.

forestRealm.name: School: Classroom
forestRealm.description: Dense forests with ancient trees and mystical creatures

urbanCityscape.name: Home: Living Room
urbanCityscape.description: Bustling metropolis with towering skyscrapers and neon lights

desertWasteland.name: Park: Playground
desertWasteland.description: Vast sandy expanse with hidden treasures and dangers

underwaterWorld.name: Underwater World
underwaterWorld.description: Explore the depths of mysterious ocean realms

mountainPeaks.name: Mountain Peaks
mountainPeaks.description: Scale majestic mountains and discover hidden valleys

spaceStation.name: Space Station
spaceStation.description: Experience zero gravity in futuristic orbital facilities

teamPage.title: Our Team

waitlistPage.title: Join the AURA waitlist
waitlistPage.subtitle: Reserve your spot for the next wave of immersive autism treatment pilots. We prioritize teams with clear clinical and education use cases.

whyJoin.title: Why teams join now
whyJoin.description: Early partners help shape workflows before general launch.

priorityOnboarding.title: Priority onboarding
priorityOnboarding.description: Get first access to private beta with guided setup from our team.

founderUpdates.title: Founder updates
founderUpdates.description: Receive product drops, roadmap previews, and experiment invites.

clinicalTrust.title: Built for clinical trust
clinicalTrust.description: Designed with therapists and researchers to stay safe and practical.

form.title: Apply for early access
form.description: Tell us about your team and how you plan to use AURA.
form.success: You are on the list. We will email {{email}} when a slot opens.
